case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. ALLEGHENY MUTUAL CASUALTY COMPANY &

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY MUTUAL CASUALTY COMPANY & HENRY W. RANDALL BAIL BONDS
